# samling
## AI theatre 
- "When a robot writes a play." czech essai on LLM-generate theatre play, [ggl doc of analysis](https://bit.ly/theaitre-script-analysis).

## ann cotton 
*poetisch denken* (0x0a), associations:

- term paper uljana wolf basic modeling [most probable output](https://ada-sub.dh-index.org/school/papers/013/DYN_HA_s.php?title=DYN_HA&ref=pages#_451_most_probable_text)
  - this was (2024) a very basic approach to generate content by distribution probabilities in u. wolf oeuvre and already shows similarities to what we read in the "ann cotten"-0x0a texts
- torch model [generated content](https://esteeschwarz.github.io/SPUND-LX/pages/004/model-collapse-lki.html#g2) of @glaser_benjaminfeldkraft_2024
  - a more recent essai to demonstrate model collaps where you see in the G1 content created from a very small training set that theres a lot of rubbish produced which proves the hypothesis that the 0x0a training corpus also was very small.
